rule_text: Section side padding is 24px left/right on ALL sections (section.padding.sides) — this consistency is what makes assembly seamless; full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px but text within them still respects the 24px insets. Vertical rhythm uses an 8px base unit (layout.base_unit); all padding/margins are multiples of 8. Each section owns its own 32px top AND bottom internal padding (section.padding.vertical) with no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking. Heading→body gap 16px; paragraph→paragraph 16px; body→callout/CTA 24px (layout.gap.body_callout); image→caption 8px (layout.gap.image_caption).
intent: Enforce a consistent 8px-based spacing system enabling zero-gap section stacking.
summary: Section padding sides fixed at 24px; vertical padding 32px top/bottom; vertical rhythm base 8px; gaps: heading-body 16px, paragraph-paragraph 16px, body-callout 24px, image-caption 8px; zero-gap stacking between sections.
